name: Parsley Root & Pureed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
Preferably a boiling type such as white rose, red rose or Yukon Gold
1. Cut potatoes (peeled or unpeeled) into 4 or 5 pieces.
2. Peel parsley roots and cut into 1-inch pieces.
3. Place potatoes and parsley root in a saucepan; cover generously with water.
4. Add 1 teaspoon of the salt and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook until potatoes are easily pierced with tines of a fork, about 15 minutes.
6. Drain the vegetables. Return them to the saucepan.
7. Combine milk and half-and-half; add about 1/4 cup of this mixture to the hot vegetables.
8. Mash, adding the remaining milk mixture gradually until the desired consistency is reached.
9. Stir in butter, the remaining salt, pepper, and minced parsley.
Serves 6 to 8.
